npcs.name: Exam Proctor
dialogue: The finals are a tournament. Win every match to be named Chunin.
Step into the arena when you're ready.
FIRST MATCH: Neji Hyuga of the Hyuga clan.
His Gentle Fist seals chakra points. Show me the spirit of a true warrior!

boss.victory_text: Neji concedes. 'Perhaps fate is not so fixed after all.'

dialogue: SECOND MATCH: Kankuro of the Sand, the puppet master.

boss.victory_text: Kankuro's puppet clatters to the ground in pieces.

dialogue: THIRD MATCH: Temari of the Sand, mistress of the wind fan.

boss.victory_text: Temari folds her fan with a smirk. 'Not bad, Leaf.'

dialogue: FINAL MATCH: Gaara of the Desert. His sand has never let an enemy touch him.
Win this, and you are Chunin.

boss.victory_text: Gaara's sand shield shatters at last. He stares at you, something almost human in his eyes. CHAMPION!
